title: Node.Js Developer - Remote
description: Job Description Job Title: Node.Js Developer Job Type: Contract Location: Remote Job Summary: In this role, you'll apply your expertise to help train next-generation AI systems. Your work will shape how models learn, reason, and perform through high-quality, real-world input. No prior experience in AI is required — your domain knowledge is what matters. Key Responsibilities Leverage your deep knowledge of Node.js, JavaScript, and TypeScript to provide expert-level input and feedback for AI system development. Analyze and review code samples to ensure accuracy, efficiency, and adherence to best practices. Collaborate with multidisciplinary teams to identify key development patterns and problem-solving strategies in backend engineering. Evaluate real-world Node.js scenarios to help models learn robust, scalable, and maintainable solutions. Document insights, edge cases, and nuanced technical considerations in clear, effective written form. Contribute to model training by communicating complex concepts in a way that's accessible for both technical and non-technical stakeholders. Uphold high standards of written and verbal communication with both internal and external partners. Required Skills And Qualifications Extensive hands-on experience with Node.js, JavaScript, and TypeScript in professional environments. Expert problem-solving and debugging abilities within distributed application systems. Strong attention to detail in both code review and written documentation. Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with an emphasis on clarity and thoroughness. Deep understanding of backend application architectures and common development patterns. Demonstrated ability to analyze and articulate technical trade-offs and solutions. Proactive, collaborative approach to cross-functional teamwork. Preferred Qualifications Prior experience contributing to AI-related projects or model training initiatives. Background in designing or maintaining large-scale, high-availability Node.js applications. Experience with remote collaboration and asynchronous communication tools.

title: Fullstack Developer (React/Node.js) (Remote)
description: Role : Fullstack Developer (React/Node.js) (Remote) Location : Remote (Work from Anywhere) Job Type : Full-Time Payout : $230K - $280K/yr Role Overview: We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a Fullstack Developer (React/Node.js) - US to work on a full-time basis. The role involves building and maintaining scalable web applications using modern JavaScript frameworks and backend services. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software solutions. Key Responsibilities: • Develop and optimize full-stack applications using React.js for frontend and Node.js for backend services. • Design and implement RESTful APIs and database schemas to support application functionality. • Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code while adhering to best practices and coding standards. • Debug, troubleshoot, and resolve technical issues across the stack to ensure system reliability. • Participate in code reviews, architectural discussions, and sprint planning to drive continuous improvement. Required Skills & Qualifications: • Proficiency in React.js and Node.js with a strong understanding of their ecosystems. • Experience with frontend technologies such as HTML5, CSS3, and modern JavaScript (ES6+). • Familiarity with backend frameworks like Express.js and database systems such as PostgreSQL or MongoDB. • Knowledge of version control systems, particularly Git, and CI/CD pipelines. • Experience with testing frameworks (Jest, Mocha) and debugging tools. More About the Opportunity: This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Technology, Information and Internet industry, contributing to the development of mission-critical applications. The position provides exposure to cutting-edge technologies and collaborative problem-solving in a distributed team environment. Equal Opportunity Employer: We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications. Apply Now!

title: Backend Developer - C#/.NET (Remote)
description: Role : Backend Developer - C#/.NET (Remote) Location : Remote (Work from Anywhere) Job Type: Contract Payout : $30 - $55/hour Role Overview: We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a Backend C#/.NET Developer to work on a contract basis. The role involves developing and maintaining backend services using C# and .NET technologies. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver scalable and efficient solutions. Key Responsibilities: • Develop, test, and deploy backend services and APIs using C# and .NET. • Design and implement robust, scalable architecture solutions. • Collaborate with frontend developers and other stakeholders to integrate systems. • Optimize application performance and resolve technical issues. • Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code following best practices. Required Skills & Qualifications: • Proficiency in C# and .NET framework development. • Experience with backend API development and integration. • Knowledge of database design and SQL Server or similar databases. • Familiarity with cloud platforms such as Azure or AWS is preferred. • Strong problem-solving and debugging skills. More About the Opportunity: This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Software Development industry, contributing to the development of cutting-edge backend solutions. The position is fully remote, allowing for flexible work arrangements. Equal Opportunity Employer: We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications. Apply Now!
